OPPORTUNITY MARKETPLACE

SHIELD IDIQ
(you are here)
SHIELD IDIQ
Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD)
Multiple Award Indefinite Delivery Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ)
$151B versatile IDIQ vehicle that allows MDA and Department of War (DoW) entities to quickly pursue different types of FAR-based acquisitions under one enterprise contracting vehicle with more than 2,400 contract holders.
LEARN MORE
Check out the SHIELD flyer to learn more
Get More Details
